hall-1.name: Hall 1
hall-1.description: One of the main halls of KINTEX Center 1, suitable for large-scale exhibitions and events.

hall-2.name: Hall 2
hall-2.description: A multi-purpose exhibition space hosting various industrial exhibitions and conventions.

hall-3.name: Hall 3
hall-3.description: An exhibition hall boasting a high ceiling height that allows for double-decker booth installation.

hall-4.name: Hall 4
hall-4.description: A space with a solid floor load capable of heavy equipment exhibition.

hall-5.name: Hall 5
hall-5.description: The last hall of Center 1, capable of large-scale integrated exhibition in conjunction with Hall 4.

hall-6.name: Hall 6
hall-6.description: The starting hall of Center 2, suitable for small and medium-sized professional exhibitions.

hall-7.name: Hall 7
hall-7.description: A large hall of Center 2, providing modern facilities and wide spaces.

hall-8.name: Hall 8
hall-8.description: A space where international exhibitions and corporate events are actively held.

hall-9.name: Hall 9
hall-9.description: One of the largest single halls in KINTEX, optimized for ultra-large events.

hall-10.name: Hall 10
hall-10.description: An exhibition hall where the latest architectural technologies are concentrated, supporting mammoth-scale events with Hall 9.

f-sodam.name: Sodam (Korean)
f-sodam.description: KINTEX's representative Korean restaurant providing neat Korean meals.

f-benvenuto.name: Caffe Bene
f-benvenuto.description: A cafe providing a comfortable rest space with a view of the exhibition hall.

f-myeongdong.name: Myeongdong Kalguksu
f-myeongdong.description: A noodle restaurant famous for its deep broth and chewy noodles.

c-cu1.name: CU Convenience Store
c-cu1.description: Various drinks, snacks, and convenience items are prepared for visitors.

c-press.name: Press Center
c-press.description: A space for journalists to write articles and hold briefings.

h-sonocalm.name: Sono Calm Goyang
h-sonocalm.description: A premium 5-star hotel near KINTEX providing the best relaxation.

h-gloucester.name: Gloucester Hotel KINTEX
h-gloucester.description: Located right next to KINTEX, providing optimal accessibility for business visitors.
